title: Track and verify external reuse events
context: Elyos success is outcomes delivered, so external reuse must be tracked with externally verifiable evidence - no self-reported reuse. This task records verifiable reuse events for delivered dictionaries.
objective: Record at least three externally verifiable external reuse events for delivered dictionaries.
acceptanceCriteria: >= 3 verifiable external reuse events recorded (citation / commons adoption / PR reference), each linking to externally verifiable evidence (no self-reported reuse).
